name: TP-Link Omada 8-Port 2.5GBASE-T and 2-Port 10GE SFP+ Smart Switch with 8-Port PoE+ - Gigabit Ethernet, 100 Gigabit Ethernet, 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet - 100Base-T, 1000Base-T, 2500Base-T, 10GBase-X - 180.1
